evals.name: app-mvp-goal
evals.prompt: 帮我做个 App，可以本地跑起来，先做 MVP。
evals.expected_output: 选择 Codex 或 Claude /goal，生成真实 Markdown goal 契约文件，并输出一行引用该文件的短 /goal prompt。
expectations: runtime_choice_correct: chooses /goal rather than /loop for a local MVP build task
file_backed_goal: creates or names a real Markdown goal contract file and treats it as the source of truth
goal_command_short: uses a one-line /goal prompt under 350 characters that references the Markdown file with @path
has_verification: includes concrete local runtime evidence such as build/start command, browser check, screenshot, logs, or command output
has_boundaries: states allowed writes and forbidden paths/systems
has_stop_pause: includes completion evidence and pause/block conditions
no_placeholders: contains no unresolved placeholders such as [TODO], <path>, TBD, 待补充, or 待定
no_dangerous_vague: avoids weak instructions such as make sure it works, keep trying, edit anything, 随便改, or 一直尝试

evals.name: deploy-loop
evals.prompt: 让 Claude 每 5 分钟检查部署是否完成，有问题提醒我。
evals.expected_output: 选择 Claude /loop 5m，输出时间驱动的轮询提示，包含观察信号、报告格式、停止或升级条件，不误判成 /goal。
expectations: runtime_choice_correct: chooses /loop 5m rather than /goal for timed deployment polling
has_verification: names concrete status sources such as CI, deployment logs, dashboard, PR, or release state
has_boundaries: states read/write boundaries and forbids deploy, rollback, merge, or production changes unless approved
has_stop_pause: includes stop, alert, escalation, timeout, or human approval conditions
no_placeholders: contains no unresolved placeholders such as [TODO], <path>, TBD, 待补充, or 待定
no_dangerous_vague: avoids weak instructions such as make sure it works, keep trying, edit anything, 随便改, or 一直尝试

evals.name: bare-loop-md
evals.prompt: 帮我写一个 `.claude/loop.md`，让 bare `/loop` 默认检查 PR 和 CI。
evals.expected_output: 输出单一默认 loop prompt，可保存为 .claude/loop.md；强调 bare /loop 默认提示，不写成多个独立定时任务清单。
expectations: runtime_choice_correct: chooses .claude/loop.md as a single default prompt for bare /loop
has_verification: names concrete observation signals such as PR status, CI checks, failing logs, reviews, or merge state
has_boundaries: states read/write boundaries and forbids unrelated changes, merging, deployment, or destructive actions
has_stop_pause: includes escalation, timeout, repeated failure, or human approval conditions
no_placeholders: contains no unresolved placeholders such as [TODO], <path>, TBD, 待补充, or 待定
no_dangerous_vague: avoids weak instructions such as make sure it works, keep trying, edit anything, 随便改, or 一直尝试

evals.name: flaky-test-goal
evals.prompt: 修复现有仓库里的 flaky test。
evals.expected_output: 选择 /goal，生成真实 Markdown goal 契约文件，并输出一行引用该文件的短 /goal prompt；契约要求先发现测试命令和最小复现，再做最小修复并连续验证目标测试。
expectations: runtime_choice_correct: chooses /goal rather than /loop for fixing a flaky test
file_backed_goal: creates or names a real Markdown goal contract file and treats it as the source of truth
goal_command_short: uses a one-line /goal prompt under 350 characters that references the Markdown file with @path
has_verification: requires discovering or running relevant test commands and repeated passing evidence
has_boundaries: limits writes to target test, fixtures, and directly related implementation
has_stop_pause: includes completion evidence and pause conditions for missing repro, environment, credentials, or product decisions
no_placeholders: contains no unresolved placeholders such as [TODO], <path>, TBD, 待补充, or 待定
no_dangerous_vague: avoids weak instructions such as make sure it works, keep trying, edit anything, 随便改, or 一直尝试

evals.name: translation-negative
evals.prompt: 把这句话翻译成英文：今天晚上不要发布。
evals.expected_output: 不强行使用 /goal、/loop、goal.md 或 .claude/loop.md；直接给翻译或建议普通 prompt。
expectations: runtime_choice_correct: does not force /goal, /loop, goal.md, or .claude/loop.md for a simple translation
has_verification: either not applicable for this simple prompt or gives a lightweight self-check such as preserving meaning
has_boundaries: either not applicable or clearly says no loop contract is needed
has_stop_pause: either not applicable or clearly says the task should complete in one response
no_placeholders: contains no unresolved placeholders such as [TODO], <path>, TBD, 待补充, or 待定
no_dangerous_vague: avoids weak instructions such as make sure it works, keep trying, edit anything, 随便改, or 一直尝试
